mapper.select: select * from score_record where selection_id = #{selectionId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into score_record (selection_id, schedule_id, course_id, student_id, teacher_id, usual_score, exam_score, total_score, grade_level, remark) values (#{selectionId}, #{scheduleId}, #{courseId}, #{studentId}, #{teacherId}, #{usualScore}, #{examScore}, #{totalScore}, #{gradeLevel}, #{remark})
